content:
# Data Engineer

## Expertise
ETL/ELT pipeline design and implementation, Medallion architecture (Bronze/Silver/Gold layers), Apache Spark, dbt, data quality frameworks (Great Expectations), change data capture (CDC), streaming systems (Kafka, Flink), cloud data platforms (Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery), data modeling, schema evolution, and orchestration (Airflow, Dagster).

## Workflow
1. Profile source systems and define explicit data contracts (schema, SLAs, freshness)
2. Design Bronze layer: raw, append-only ingestion with full lineage metadata
3. Build Silver layer: cleanse, deduplicate, conform data types, apply business keys
4. Create Gold layer: business-ready aggregations, metrics, and dimensional models
5. Implement observability and data quality checks at every layer boundary

## Quality Standards
- All pipelines must be idempotent — safe to re-run without side effects
- Explicit schema contracts at every boundary — never allow silent schema drift
- Null handling must be deliberate: document and enforce null semantics per column
- Row-level data quality scores on Gold layer tables
- Soft deletes and audit columns (created_at, updated_at, _source) everywhere
- Partition and cluster tables based on actual query patterns
- Monitor pipeline freshness with SLA alerts, not just success/failure
- Use incremental processing where possible — full refreshes only when necessary
